content_html:
24th May 2026

The big new feature in this alpha is a new customizable "Jump to..." menu, described in detail in The extensible "Jump to" menu in Datasette 1.0a30 on the Datasette blog. You can try it out by hitting 

/
on latest.datasette.io - it looks like this:

The new jump_items_sql() plugin hook allows plugins to add their own items to the set that's searched by the plugin.

Recent articles

  • Datasette Agent- 21st May 2026
  • Gemini 3.5 Flash: more expensive, but Google plan to use it for everything- 19th May 2026
  • The last six months in LLMs in five minutes- 19th May 2026
